name: Noodles and Cheese
recipeIngredient: 1 pound fresh part-skim mozzarella cottage cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the noodles according to package instructions until al dente.
2. Drain the cooked noodles and transfer them to a serving dish or bowl.
3. Add the cottage cheese to the noodles and mix gently until combined.
4. Taste the mixture and add honey, cinnamon, and/or raisins as desired for flavor.
5. Serve immediately and enjoy your creamy noodles with cheese!
